hooks.command:
input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'rpipe\.go$'; then version=$(grep 'const VERSION' "$file" 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '"[^"]+"'); if [ -n "$version" ]; then cd /home/user/rpipe && go build -o rpipe . 2>/dev/null && usage=$(./rpipe -h 2>&1 | sed 's|^Usage: \./rpipe|Usage: rpipe|'); python3 -c "
import re, sys
content = open('README.md').read()
new_usage = sys.argv[1]
pattern = r'(## Usage\n\n\x60\x60\x60\n).*?(\n\x60\x60\x60)'
result = re.sub(pattern, r'\\1' + re.escape(new_usage) + r'\\2', content, flags=re.DOTALL)
open('README.md', 'w').write(result)
" "$usage" 2>/dev/null; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"VERSION is $version — README.md usage block updated. Remember to retranslate README.ko.md from README.md.\"}"; fi; fi
